metadata.description: Azure region for the project, VNet, and APIM. Example: canadaeast.
Name for the project-region AI Services / Foundry account.
Model deployed on the project Foundry account (covers local agent needs and fallback).
First Foundry project name (base; suffix appended at deploy time).
Description and display name for the first project.
Name for the VNet (created if missing).
Existing VNet resource ID if reusing. Leave empty to create a new VNet.
Address space for the VNet (only used when creating a new VNet).
Subnet CIDR for the cross-region PE into the backend Foundry account. Must be a /27 or larger inside vnetAddressPrefix.
Subnet CIDR for APIM SV2 outbound VNet integration. Must be a /27 or larger.
Existing APIM service resource ID. Leave empty to let this template create a new StandardV2 APIM.
Name for the new APIM service. Globally unique. Ignored if apiManagementResourceId is provided. Leave empty to auto-generate.
Publisher email required by APIM at create time.
Publisher organization name required by APIM at create time.
Region for the backend Foundry account. Must differ from location. Example: japaneast.
Globally unique name for the backend Foundry account. 2-64 chars, no dots.
Model deployments to create on the backend account. Each entry: { name, format, version, skuName, capacity }.
Foundry portal name for the AI Gateway connection. Shows up as <connectionName>/<deploymentName> in agent code.
Inference API version sent to the backend by Foundry SDK calls.
Application (client) ID of the Foundry project managed identity. APIM uses this to validate inbound tokens.
Project capability host name.
Azure region for the VNet (must equal the project region).
Name of the virtual network. Created if it does not exist.
Whether to use an existing VNet instead of creating one.
Subscription ID of the existing VNet if different from current.
Resource group of the existing VNet if different from current.
Address space for the VNet. Required when useExistingVnet is false.
Subnet name and CIDR for the Foundry agent subnet (delegated to Microsoft.App/environments).
Subnet name and CIDR for in-region private endpoints (Foundry account, Storage, Cosmos, AI Search, APIM).
Subnet name and CIDR for the cross-region private endpoint to the backend Foundry account.
Azure region for the deployment
The name of the virtual network
Indicates if an existing VNet should be used
Subscription ID of the existing VNet (if different from current subscription)
Resource Group name of the existing VNet (if different from current resource group)
The name of Agents Subnet
The name of Private Endpoint subnet
Address space for the VNet (only used for new VNet)
Address prefix for the agent subnet
Address prefix for the private endpoint subnet
Azure region for the deployment
The name of the virtual network
The name of Agents Subnet
The name of Hub subnet
Address space for the VNet
Address prefix for the agent subnet
Address prefix for the private endpoint subnet
The name of the existing virtual network
Subscription ID of virtual network (if different from current subscription)
Resource Group name of the existing VNet (if different from current resource group)
The name of Agents Subnet
The name of Private Endpoint subnet
Address prefix for the agent subnet (only needed if creating new subnet)
Address prefix for the private endpoint subnet (only needed if creating new subnet)

parameters.addressPrefix: [if(empty(parameters('agentSubnetPrefix')), createObject('value', cidrSubnet(reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('vnetResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName')), '2024-05-01').addressSpace.addressPrefixes[0], 24, 0)), createObject('value', parameters('agentSubnetPrefix')))]

Name of the subnet

subnetId.value: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[1])]

parameters.addressPrefix: [if(empty(parameters('peSubnetPrefix')), createObject('value', cidrSubnet(reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('vnetResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName')), '2024-05-01').addressSpace.addressPrefixes[0], 24, 1)), createObject('value', parameters('peSubnetPrefix')))]

resources.name: [format('apim-{0}-deployment', variables('uniqueSuffix'))]

apimOutboundSubnetId.value: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('apimOutboundSubnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('apimOutboundSubnetName')), '/')[1])]

metadata.description: Region for APIM. Should match the project region.
Globally unique APIM service name. Resolves to <name>.azure-api.net.
Resource ID of the apim-outbound subnet in the project VNet.
Publisher email — required by APIM at create time.
Publisher organization name — required by APIM at create time.
StandardV2 capacity units. 1 is enough for a single-region pattern.

dependsOn: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('apimOutboundSubnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('apimOutboundSubnetName')), '/')[1])]

metadata.description: Backend region — distinct from the project region. Example: japaneast when the project lives in canadaeast.
Name of the backend Foundry account. Must be globally unique. 2-64 chars, no dots.
Array of model deployments to create on the backend account. Each entry shape: { name, format, version, skuName, capacity }.
Project-region location for the PE NIC (NOT the backend account region).
Backend Foundry account resource ID — the cross-region target.
Resource ID of the backend-pe subnet (in the project region VNet).
Suffix used to name the PE + DNS zone group.
Existing private DNS zone for privatelink.cognitiveservices.azure.com (linked to the VNet by template 16).
Existing private DNS zone for privatelink.openai.azure.com (linked to the VNet by template 16).
Existing private DNS zone for privatelink.services.ai.azure.com (linked to the VNet by template 16).

parameters.apimPrincipalId: [if(variables('shouldCreateApim'), createObject('value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('apim-{0}-deployment', variables('uniqueSuffix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.apimPrincipalId.value), createObject('value', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', variables('apimIdParts')[2], variables('apimIdParts')[4]), 'Microsoft.ApiManagement/service', variables('apimIdParts')[8]), '2024-05-01', 'full').identity.principalId))]

metadata.description: Object/principal ID of the APIM service MI.
Backend Foundry account name. The role assignment is scoped to this account.
Name of the APIM service the API is created on.
Tenant ID used to validate inbound Entra tokens from the Foundry project MI.
Application (client) ID of the Foundry project managed identity that is allowed to call this API. Must match the appId behind the project MI principalId.
Audience the Foundry project requested its token for. Must match the Audience set on the Foundry model connection. Default is the standard Cognitive Services audience.
Backend Foundry account name — used to compose the privatelink FQDN.
Backend Foundry account region — emitted on x-aigw-region trace header.
Project region — emitted on x-aigw-region trace header for visibility into cross-region routing.
Inference API path under the APIM gateway. Default = inference, so the full URL is https://<apim>.azure-api.net/inference/deployments/{deploymentName}/chat/completions.

variables.inboundPolicyXml:
<policies>
  <inbound>
    <base />
    <validate-azure-ad-token tenant-id="${TENANT_ID}" header-name="Authorization" failed-validation-httpcode="401" failed-validation-error-message="Unauthorized: Foundry project MI token failed validation.">
      <client-application-ids>
        <application-id>${PROJECT_MI_CLIENT_ID}</application-id>
      </client-application-ids>
      <audiences>
        <audience>${TOKEN_AUDIENCE}</audience>
      </audiences>
    </validate-azure-ad-token>
    <set-backend-service base-url="${BACKEND_BASE_URL}" />
    <authentication-managed-identity resource="${TOKEN_AUDIENCE}" />
    <set-header name="x-aigw-backend" exists-action="override">
      <value>${APIM_NAME} / ${BACKEND_ACCOUNT_NAME}</value>
    </set-header>
    <set-header name="x-aigw-region" exists-action="override">
      <value>${PROJECT_REGION} to ${BACKEND_REGION}</value>
    </set-header>
  </inbound>
  <backend><base /></backend>
  <outbound>
    <base />
    <set-header name="x-aigw-backend" exists-action="override">
      <value>${APIM_NAME} / ${BACKEND_ACCOUNT_NAME}</value>
    </set-header>
    <set-header name="x-aigw-region" exists-action="override">
      <value>${PROJECT_REGION} to ${BACKEND_REGION}</value>
    </set-header>
  </outbound>
  <on-error><base /></on-error>
</policies>
variables.renderedPolicy: [replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(variables('inboundPolicyXml'), '${TENANT_ID}', parameters('tenantId')), '${PROJECT_MI_CLIENT_ID}', parameters('projectMiClientId')), '${TOKEN_AUDIENCE}', parameters('tokenAudience')), '${BACKEND_BASE_URL}', variables('backendBaseUrl')), '${APIM_NAME}', parameters('apimName')), '${BACKEND_ACCOUNT_NAME}', parameters('backendAccountName')), '${PROJECT_REGION}', parameters('projectRegion'))]

templateParameters.name: deploymentName
templateParameters.description: Model deployment name on the backend Foundry account

variables.conditionStr: [format('((!(ActionMatches{{''Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers/blobs/tags/read''}})  AND  !(ActionMatches{{''Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers/blobs/filter/action''}}) AND  !(ActionMatches{{''Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers/blobs/tags/write''}}) ) OR (@Resource[Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers:name] StringStartsWithIgnoreCase ''{0}'' AND @Resource[Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers:name] StringLikeIgnoreCase ''*-azureml-agent''))', parameters('workspaceId'))]

Project name

Name for the connection (auto-generated if empty)

Share connection to all project users
Whether deployment name is in URL path vs body
API version for inference calls (chat completions, embeddings)

Endpoint for listing models (enables dynamic discovery)
Endpoint for getting model details (enables dynamic discovery)
Provider for model discovery (AzureOpenAI, etc.)
Static model list (array of model objects, optional)
Custom headers (object with string key-value pairs, optional)
Authentication configuration (object for custom auth headers)

variables.validationMessage: [if(variables('bothConfiguredError'), 'ERROR: Cannot configure both static models and dynamic discovery. Use either staticModels array OR modelDiscovery parameters, not both.', '')]
variables.neitherConfiguredMessage: ERROR: Must configure either static models (staticModels array) OR dynamic discovery (listModelsEndpoint, getModelEndpoint, deploymentProvider). Cannot have neither.
variables.metadata: [union(createObject('deploymentInPath', parameters('deploymentInPath')), if(variables('hasInferenceAPIVersion'), createObject('inferenceAPIVersion', parameters('inferenceAPIVersion')), createObject()), if(variables('hasDeploymentAPIVersion'), createObject('deploymentAPIVersion', parameters('deploymentAPIVersion')), createObject()), if(variables('hasModelDiscovery'), createObject('modelDiscovery', string(createObject('listModelsEndpoint', parameters('listModelsEndpoint'), 'getModelEndpoint', parameters('getModelEndpoint'), 'deploymentProvider', parameters('deploymentProvider')))), createObject()), if(and(variables('hasStaticModels'), not(variables('hasModelDiscovery'))), createObject('models', string(parameters('staticModels'))), createObject()), if(variables('hasCustomHeaders'), createObject('customHeaders', string(parameters('customHeaders'))), createObject()), if(variables('hasAuthConfig'), createObject('authConfig', string(parameters('authConfig'))), createObject()))]

properties.target: [format('{0}/{1}', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', variables('apimSubscriptionId'), variables('apimResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.ApiManagement/service', variables('apimServiceName')), '2021-08-01').gatewayUrl, reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', variables('apimSubscriptionId'), variables('apimResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/apis', variables('apimServiceName'), parameters('apiName')), '2021-08-01').path)]
